author: mark
text:
Document federated multi-repo state in the README

The README config table documented target_branch, delivery.mode, min_bl_version and the rest, but never master_url, state_remote, or the .balls/master.json pointer file -- and had no federated-deployment section at all, despite federation being the dominant feature of recent work. master_url appeared exactly once, in passing.

Add a Federated multi-repo state section (sibling to The bare central hub) covering the hub/participant topology, the state-repo clone and symlink seam, master-wins config single-sourcing, the bridge pattern, the bl remaster verb, and hard-fail/soft-fail reachability. Add a master.json pointer subsection to the Config section documenting both fields. Add state hub and federated mode glossary entries. The operational summary defers to docs/SPEC-federated-state.md as the authoritative contract.
